title: The Hero With a Thousand Faces
author: Joseph Campbell
subline: Departure. Initiation. Return. The same shape, again.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The monomyth as a 12-step circle: a single circle with 12 tick marks, a red dot at step 7 (the inmost cave / apotheosis). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)">
    <!-- The 12-o'clock circle = the monomyth loop -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="500" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="498" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- 12 stage ticks -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="0" y1="-510" x2="0" y2="-490"/>
      <line x1="250" y1="-433" x2="240" y2="-415"/>
      <line x1="433" y1="-250" x2="415" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="500" y1="0" x2="480" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="433" y1="250" x2="415" y2="240"/>
      <line x1="250" y1="433" x2="240" y2="415"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="510" x2="0" y2="490"/>
      <line x1="-250" y1="433" x2="-240" y2="415"/>
      <line x1="-433" y1="250" x2="-415" y2="240"/>
      <line x1="-500" y1="0" x2="-480" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-433" y1="-250" x2="-415" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="-250" y1="-433" x2="-240" y2="-415"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The hero's path traced around the circle in 12 dots -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-500" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="250" cy="-433" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="433" cy="-250" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="500" cy="0" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="433" cy="250" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="250" cy="433" r="5"/>
      <!-- step 7 (the inmost cave, BOTTOM) is RED — the apotheosis -->
      <circle cx="0" cy="500" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <circle cx="-250" cy="433" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-433" cy="250" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-500" cy="0" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-433" cy="-250" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-250" cy="-433" r="5"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Two stage labels in tiny whisper text -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#4c4c4c">
      <text x="0" y="-540" text-anchor="middle">DEPARTURE</text>
      <text x="0" y="560" text-anchor="middle" fill="#fc1c46">APOTHEOSIS</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A radial line pointing down to the red dot -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-300" x2="0" y2="450" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 6"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The monomyth is a 12-step loop. We render it as a 500px-radius circle with 12 tick marks, 11 ash dots, and ONE red dot at the bottom (the apotheosis / inmost cave). A whisper label marks the two poles. Title 180px whisper weight at the top — modest because the diagram is the cover.
